import React from 'react'
import { useReviewsContext, ReviewsProvider } from './ReviewsProvider'
function ReviewsRating() {
    const { formData } = useReviewsContext()
    console.log('>>>>', formData)
    return <>
        <ReviewsProvider>
            Reviews & Rating
        </ReviewsProvider>
    </>
}

export default ReviewsRating
